overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Odyssey) depicting ancient Greece. The character walks through the Sanctuary of Olympia, passing seated NPCs on benches, along a stone water channel, and approaching a grand temple with purple-carpeted steps under bright Mediterranean sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a stone path past NPCs seated on benches

standing guard or attendant facing the seated group

entered.detail: row of wooden benches with red cushions where NPCs are seated under a rocky overhang
low stone wall with geometric lattice cutout patterns running along the right side of the path
mature tree with thick trunk and spreading green canopy behind the seating area
classical Greek temple with stone columns and pediment visible on the rocky hillside
sunlit rocky terrain with sparse grass rising behind the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered seating area along a sanctuary path, with four NPCs sitting on benches to the left. A decorative stone railing runs along the path, and in the distance, a large olive tree and classical Greek temple are visible against a rocky hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sanctuary path alongside a water channel

events.description: exits the covered bench area into the open sanctuary grounds with full sky visibility
stone water channel becomes visible running parallel to the path on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path with the water channel now visible on the right side

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians walking across the open sanctuary area ahead

entered.detail: rectangular stone-lined channel with greenish water running along the edge of the path
several medium-sized trees with green foliage scattered across the open grounds

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open sanctuary grounds with full sky visibility. The stone water channel appears on the right, running parallel to the path. The temple grows larger in the center view as the camera moves forward, and scattered trees dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: main temple plaza with circular training area

events.description: entering the main sanctuary plaza with the temple's purple-carpeted steps prominently visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand temple steps while passing NPCs exercising in the circular plaza

notable_agents.action: NPC in brown tunic walking ahead toward the temple steps
group of NPCs practicing combat or athletics in the circular dirt area

entered.detail: grand stone staircase with purple ceremonial carpets leading up to the temple entrance
large rocky mountain rising prominently behind the temple complex
open circular area with dirt ground marked by white lines in front of the temple

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main sanctuary plaza, approaching the temple's purple-carpeted steps. A large mountain rises behind the temple, and NPCs can be seen exercising in the circular dirt plaza. The water channel falls behind as the camera moves toward the temple entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered sanctuary walkway into a wide, sun-drenched plaza dominated by a grand Greek temple. It begins in a covered seating area where NPCs rest on benches beside a decorative stone railing, with a distant temple and olive tree visible against a rocky hillside. As the camera moves forward, the shelter gives way to open grounds where a stone water channel appears on the right and the temple grows larger in the center view. The scene then expands into the main sanctuary plaza, passing NPCs exercising in a circular dirt area while the water channel falls behind. Finally, the camera approaches the temple's purple-carpeted steps, revealing a massive mountain rising sharply behind the structure.
